problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: If Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
